description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/datadrivendiscovery/images/testing-docker:ubuntu-bionic with a docker:19-dind service, setting DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375 and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive. Define stages base, shared, libs, core, primitives, testing, and deploy, and a .build_image template that runs before_script docker info and docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p "$CI_JOB_TOKEN" "$CI_REGISTRY". Add base:ubuntu-bionic-python36, base:ubuntu-bionic-python37, base:ubuntu-bionic-python38, base:ubuntu-focal-python39 jobs in the base stage that each execute ./build.sh base <image>, core-lite:ubuntu-bionic-python36-devel, core-lite:ubuntu-bionic-python36-master, core-lite:ubuntu-bionic-python37-devel, core-lite:ubuntu-bionic-python37-master, core-lite:ubuntu-bionic-python38-devel, core-lite:ubuntu-bionic-python38-master, core:ubuntu-bionic-python36-devel, core:ubuntu-bionic-python36-master, core:ubuntu-bionic-python37-devel, core:ubuntu-bionic-python37-master, core:ubuntu-bionic-python38-devel, core:ubuntu-bionic-python38-master jobs in the core stage (core jobs have the d3m runner tag) that run ./build.sh core <image>, libs-lite:ubuntu-bionic-python36, libs-lite:ubuntu-bionic-python37, libs-lite:ubuntu-bionic-python38 jobs in the libs stage that run ./build.sh libs-lite <image>, libs:ubuntu-bionic-python36, libs:ubuntu-bionic-python37, libs:ubuntu-bionic-python38 jobs in the libs stage (with d3m runner tag) that run ./build.sh libs <image>, primitives:ubuntu-bionic-python36-devel, primitives:ubuntu-bionic-python36-master, primitives:ubuntu-bionic-python37-devel, primitives:ubuntu-bionic-python37-master, primitives:ubuntu-bionic-python38-devel, primitives:ubuntu-bionic-python38-master jobs in the primitives stage (with d3m runner tag) that run ./build.sh primitives <image>, shared:ubuntu-bionic-python36, shared:ubuntu-bionic-python37, shared:ubuntu-bionic-python38, shared:ubuntu-focal-python39 jobs in the shared stage that run ./build.sh shared <image>, testing-docker:ubuntu-bionic, testing-lite:ubuntu-bionic-python36, testing-lite:ubuntu-bionic-python37, testing-lite:ubuntu-bionic-python38, testing-lite:ubuntu-focal-python39, testing:ubuntu-bionic-python36, testing:ubuntu-bionic-python37, testing:ubuntu-bionic-python38, testing:ubuntu-focal-python39 jobs in the testing stage that run ./build.sh testing* or testing-lite* as appropriate, a dind job (only on schedules) that pulls docker:19-dind, tags it as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/docker:19-dind and pushes it, and two deploy-stage trigger jobs (trigger_docs_generation and trigger_primitives_tests) that run curl POST commands using $DOCS_TRIGGER_TOKEN and $PRIMITIVE_TESTS_TRIGGER_TOKEN respectively, both limited to the master branch.
